text.title: vui-testing-best-practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from product stage + audience to layer + subgroup coverage. Each leaf references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: unit + integration on every release; user + stress quarterly

text.example: stage=pre-launch → all 4 layers → audience non-native → non-native bucket added → LLM → seeds locked → user_test_n=10 → config valid.
